text:
Long ago in a remote village deep in the heart of the Scottish Highlands, there lived a girl named Fiona. With flowing dark locks and eyes as deep as the oldest forests, she was beloved by all. On her 21st birthday, a mysterious gift was bestowed upon her. A strange tome with a leather-bound cover that smelled faintly of oak. Every page seemed to hold a different dream, a different path.

Fiona discovered the secret page that night. Into it poured her dreams, and dreams into her life. She became skilled at ancient art; once she had a vision of a cathedral made entirely of flowers bending to a solitary figure sitting amidst them. That figure turned out to be a time traveler from a long-lost civilization keen on preserving life's beauty.

The years flew by. On this particular day, just as she'd finished sculpting an exquisite bluebell cathedral, a severe storm brewed overhead. Fiona's time traveler friend appeared, wings fluttering ominously. He whispered secrets
